inclusion: all 9 subjects, both sessions (train T + eval E); 22 EEG channels @ 250 Hz
exclusion: EOG channels; trials with documented artifacts per dataset metadata only
preprocessing: fixed band-pass 8-30 Hz, fixed epoch [0.5, 2.5] s post-cue; no per-subject tuning
statistic: sampen_lower_tail_m2_r015_v1 with S2 finite-N rule (p <= alpha/2 = 0.025)
correction: Benjamini-Hochberg FDR across subjects x classes

success_threshold.positive_control: epochs with motor-imagery structure SURVIVED fraction >= 0.80 (per class)

failure_threshold: specificity combined FPR > 0.05 OR positive-control SURVIVED < 0.80
forbidden: BNCI validated before execution artifacts exist
note: Lock freezes the confirmatory plan BEFORE any BNCI run (Phase 10.2). Execution is a separate, explicitly-authorized step; no BNCI claim exists until artifact_paths are produced.
